provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Wills Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Wills Executed in Botswana
provisions.title: Formalities required in the execution of a will
provisions.content:
3. Formalities required in the execution of a will
(1) Subject to the provisions of section 4—

definitions.definition: a person of the age of 14 years or over who at the time he witnesses a will is not incompetent to give evidence in a court of law
the High Court of Botswana or any judge thereof
the Master of the High Court of Botswana
in the case of testator the making of a mark but does not include the making of a mark in the case of a witness, and "signature" has a corresponding meaning
a codicil and any other testamentary writing.
